overview.color_grading: Natural daylight, vibrant greens, bright and sunny college campus setting, balanced contrast.
overview.target_audience: Gen Z, college students, young adults interested in passive income or mobile rewards.

personas.persona: Off-camera, authoritative but casual voice, holds a standard black dynamic microphone into frame.
Young male, casual dark t-shirt, relaxed posture, appears slightly surprised but willing to engage as he is stopped while walking.

overview.pacing: Single continuous shot, immediate hook delivery.
overview.creative_direction: Direct, pattern-interrupt question delivered in a natural public setting to immediately spark curiosity about a passive benefit.

scenes.visuals_broll: A-roll: Interviewer's hand thrusts a microphone toward a young man walking down a busy campus path. The man stops, turns his head toward the interviewer, and listens to the question. No B-roll or text overlays are present.
scenes.framing: Subject is roughly center-framed. The microphone enters from the bottom right corner, crossing into the lower third of the frame.
scenes.camera_movement: Handheld tracking, panning slightly left to follow the subject as he halts his forward momentum.
scenes.transitions_animations: Hard cut in at start. No text animations, overlays, or visual transitions.

technical_execution.asset_layering_rotoscoping: N/A. Single unedited continuous A-roll clip with no layered assets.

a_roll.action: Subject walking on a pathway, abruptly stopped by an off-camera person holding a microphone, turns to listen.
a_roll.environment: Sunny, tree-lined college campus pedestrian walkway with students in the background.

broll_generation_template.broll_standard: Over-the-shoulder shot of a user holding a smartphone in portrait mode.
UI mockup of points accumulating on a mobile app screen with a coin drop sound effect.
Close-up profile shot of a thumb swiping up on a glowing phone screen in a dimly lit room.
Wide shot of young adults walking with backpacks across a university quad.

transcript.speaker: Interviewer
transcript.text: Would you let your phone earn rewards while you scroll?
